nodes.title: Brighton Center and The PM Group Collaborate to Produce New Television Commercial
Agency Collaborates with Brighton Center for New Targeted Campaign
Register Now for the January 25th Charity Texas Poker Tournament – Over $40,000 in Prizes

pageContext.content:
The cards will be flying at the Lucky Strike Charity Poker Tournament in San Antonio! There is over $65,000 in total prize money for the top 9 finishers and complimentary drinks, food and beverages are provided all day to all players.

 

 

If you want to win big, head over and register for the Lucky Strike Tournament that will be held on Saturday, May 8th, 2021. Early bird pricing is still available!  Not only could you win a $50,000 first place prize, but the children at Brighton Center win just by you attending. All net proceeds from the tournament and silent auction will benefit their organization. This event allows Brighton Center to receive much needed necessary funds to continue supporting children of all abilities in San Antonio.

 

 

Brighton Center is a nonprofit that works with children to make sure they’re ready to enter Kindergarten. Whether you have a baby, toddler, or elementary school student Brighton has the developmental and educational resources to help them live their best life. With early childhood intervention therapy services, education advocates, a nationally accredited preschool, and special education workshops, any concerns or questions you have about your child’s development will be answered and you and your family will be provided with all of the necessary tools and resources to help your child thrive.

 

 

 

 

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. For over 33 years, the agency has continued to grow and is San Antonio’s largest advertising agency. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including home services, automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profits, real estate and fitness. For two consecutive years now, the Agency has set annual revenue records with the addition of six new clients and through the continued success of our existing clients. Additionally, the agency hosts their annual Charity Gala that to date has raised millions of dollars for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! In 2020 alone, the Agency donated over $1,050,000 to local non-profits. It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
